ShortFunction: Mediates lipoprotein-dependent transport and clearance of lipids and cholesterol between tissues via receptors
Cell-surface receptor that binds LDL and mediates clathrin-dependent endocytosis
Promotes LDL receptor degradation, reducing LDLR surface levels and regulating plasma cholesterol
Major structural apolipoprotein of chylomicrons, VLDL, and LDL that mediates LDL receptor binding.
Main structural component of lipoprotein(a) that influences lipid transport and inhibits fibrinolysis
Atypical cadherin receptor mediating cell–cell signaling during nervous system development
Mediates transfer of cholesteryl esters and triglycerides between HDL and VLDL, facilitating reverse cholesterol transport
Catalyzes HMG-CoA conversion to mevalonate, the rate-limiting step in cholesterol and isoprenoid synthesis.
Demethylates N6-methyladenosine (m6A) in mRNA, regulating mRNA methylation and stability
Transcription factor mediating Wnt/beta-catenin-dependent regulation of target gene expression.
